data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'AI learning from patterns', but the evidence provided does not demonstrate any instance of the AI learning from customer booking patterns. The linked use case mentions AI agent notes, but these do not explicitly confirm that the AI is learning from patterns as required. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence supporting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of AI learning from patterns as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
